name: 20 Minute Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a sheet pan with butter.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add the cocoa, hot water, baking soda, flour, eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared sheet pan.
6. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before frosting with boiling icing (see recipe in glazing and icing section).
